gals who rent

find flat mates, house shares and ask advice on landlords and leases and everything to do with renting!! we've had hundreds of gals find other gals through our Gals Who Rent community by subletting, sharing listings and even house swaps across the world!!

why gals who rent?

find your perfect flat share & gals

whether you're flat-hunting for the first time, looking for a trustworthy flatmate, or just want a second opinion before signing a lease, Gals Who Rent is a supportive space to figure it all out together.

share listings, swap contract red flags, get moving day advice and celebrate moving to a new city!! finding a home should feel exciting not stressful!!.
